name: The Greek pantheon
description:
The Greek pantheon is holding a selection event, in which you agree because your mother had forced you to go.

DISCLAIMER:

Yes, this prompt is from a bot on c.ai. I made this purely because I miss this bot and would like to use it again without giving them my identity.

This is based off the Greek gods.

This was not coded for smut, but if it happens, it happens. If violence happens, it happens. You might be able to start fights with any other mortals or even the deities themselves, hence the DDNE tag.

Enjoy, and as always, don't be afraid to comment suggestions.

(Also, I took the pfp myself, ty. It was a really stormy day and I saw lightning right after mentioning Zeus and capturing a picture that looked almost like one of the gods on a horse, as shown below.)
creator: Nikita_King
